events.title: Sea Empress oil spill after grounding near Milford Haven, Wales
events.description: The oil tanker Sea Empress grounded in the approaches to Milford Haven on 15 Feb 1996. The incident led to significant releases of oil during the subsequent salvage operations, polluting coastal waters and shorelines in Wales.

sources.headline: Grounding of oil tanker Sea Empress in the approaches to Milford Haven, Wales and the subsequent salvage operation

key_quotes.quote: Grounding of oil tanker Sea Empress in the approaches to Milford Haven, Wales and the subsequent salvage operation
Sea Empress, Wales, UK, 1996

events.title: EPA releases report on industrial contributions to New River pollution near Mexicali/Calexico
events.description: The U.S. EPA announced release of a report compiling information from U.S. parent companies of maquiladoras near Mexicali about reported releases potentially affecting the New River. The report addressed concerns about industrial sources contributing to pollution in the border-region river.

sources.headline: News Release (EPA): Report on New River pollution sources (border region)

key_quotes.quote: EPA released a report summarizing information collected ... regarding reported releases to the New River

events.title: John Morrell & Co. pleads guilty in Clean Water Act case involving Big Sioux River discharges
events.description: The U.S. EPA announced that John Morrell & Co. pleaded guilty in a Clean Water Act criminal case involving illegal discharges of slaughterhouse waste to the Big Sioux River and submission of false compliance information. The plea agreement included a criminal fine and establishment of a cleanup fund.

location.name: Sioux Falls, South Dakota, United States

sources.headline: News Release (EPA): John Morrell & Co. Clean Water Act criminal case (Big Sioux River)

key_quotes.quote: pleaded guilty to dumping slaughterhouse waste into the Big Sioux River and submitting false compliance data

events.title: EPA settlement over particulate emissions exceedances at BFI medical waste incinerator in Phoenix
events.description: The U.S. EPA announced a settlement with BFI Medical Waste Systems of Arizona concerning alleged exceedances of particulate-matter emission limits at a medical waste incinerator in Phoenix. The action resolved claims about repeated exceedances and included a monetary penalty.

sources.headline: News Release (EPA): Settlement with BFI Medical Waste Systems of Arizona over particulate emissions

organizations: BFI Medical Waste Systems of Arizona

key_quotes.quote: settlement ... resolve allegations that its medical waste incinerator exceeded particulate-matter emission limits

events.title: Pacific Northwest rain-on-snow flooding in Washington and Oregon
events.description: A rain-on-snow event brought heavy rainfall and unusually mild temperatures that rapidly melted mountain snowpack and triggered severe flooding west of the Cascade Mountains, including along the Willamette and Columbia Rivers.

location.name: United States (Pacific Northwest: Washington and Oregon)

key_quotes.quote: A major rain-on-snow event brought very heavy rainfall and unusually mild temperatures... triggering severe flooding... along the Willamette and Columbia Rivers.

events.title: Lower Ohio River flooding persisted into early February 1996
events.description: High river stages and flooding continued into the first week of February 1996 on the lower Ohio River as runoff from earlier January flooding moved downstream, with the flood peak passing Paducah by about February 6.

key_quotes.quote: High river stages and flooding persisted into the first week of February 1996 on the lower Ohio River... the flood peak passed Paducah by Feb. 6.

events.title: Severe Tropical Cyclone Jacob affected the northwest coast of Western Australia
events.description: Severe Tropical Cyclone Jacob reached cyclone intensity off the northwest Kimberley coast and tracked offshore of the Pilbara, peaking around early February 1996, bringing gale-force winds and heavy rainfall to coastal areas.

key_quotes.quote: Cyclone Jacob reached cyclone intensity... tracked west-southwest offshore of the Pilbara... Coastal areas experienced gale-force winds and heavy rainfall.

events.title: Early February 1996 flooding in Pilbara and Gascoyne, Western Australia
events.description: A slow-moving monsoonal low brought extreme multi-day rainfall in early February 1996, producing very high river levels including on the Ashburton River and flooding that isolated communities and made sections of the North West Coastal Highway impassable.

key_quotes.quote: A slow-moving monsoonal low... brought extreme multi-day rainfall... very high river levels... flooding... North West Coastal Highway impassable; Onslow was isolated.

events.title: Late February 1996 Southern Plains heat wave in the United States
events.description: Anomalous late-winter heat brought summer-like temperatures across parts of the Southern Plains in late February 1996, including very high temperatures reported for central Texas and southern Kansas, and was associated with very dry conditions that increased wildfire risk.

key_quotes.quote: Anomalous late-winter heat... with temperatures reaching about 100°F in central Texas and around 90°F in southern Kansas during Feb. 18–27, 1996.

events.title: Mw 6.6 earthquake near Lijiang, Yunnan, China
events.description: A damaging Mw 6.6 earthquake struck near Lijiang City in Yunnan, China, in the Sichuan–Yunnan border region.

events.title: Mw 7.5 offshore Peru earthquake and tsunami near Chimbote
events.description: A large offshore earthquake near northern Peru generated a tsunami observed along the Peruvian coast and recorded at distant tide gauges.

sources.source_name: University of Washington Earth & Space Sciences
sources.headline: Peru tsunami overview

events.title: Mw 7.1 offshore Oaxaca, Mexico earthquake
events.description: A major Mw 7.1 earthquake occurred offshore the Pacific coast of Oaxaca, Mexico, and was recorded in strong-motion databases.

events.title: Pat Sin Leng brush fire during school hike in Tai Po, Hong Kong
events.description: A brush/wildland fire on Pat Sin Leng affected a school hiking group, resulting in deaths and injuries and prompting a rescue response, according to UPI.

location.name: Pat Sin Leng, Tai Po, New Territories, Hong Kong

key_quotes.quote: children on hike

dedupe.cluster_hint: Pat Sin Leng 1996-02-10 Hong Kong brush fire school hike

events.title: Coral bleaching reported on reefs in Milne Bay Province, Papua New Guinea (Feb 1996)
events.description: A coral bleaching event was reported on reefs in Milne Bay Province during February 1996. The report described extensive bleaching affecting a large share of surveyed corals, with branching corals noted as particularly impacted, coinciding with unusually high sea temperatures.

location.name: Milne Bay Province, Papua New Guinea

events.title: Oiled seabirds reported on St. Paul Island, Alaska (Pribilof Islands) in Feb 1996
events.description: Reports of oiled seabirds on St. Paul Island in the Pribilof Islands prompted investigation in mid-to-late February 1996. Accounts describe hundreds of oiled birds reported, with later attribution to a bunker fuel spill involving the vessel M/V Citrus.

location.name: St. Paul Island, Pribilof Islands, Alaska, USA (Bering Sea)

sources.headline: King eider dies 16 years after rescue from oil spill

events.title: Pilot whale stranding reported at Farewell Spit, New Zealand (Feb 1996)
events.description: A pilot whale stranding was reported at Farewell Spit in February 1996. Reports describe rescue attempts to refloat whales and note fatalities among the stranded animals.

location.name: Farewell Spit, South Island, New Zealand

events.title: EPA approves Florida SIP revision creating a Federally enforceable state operating permit (FESOP) program
events.description: EPA published a direct final rule approving a Florida State Implementation Plan (SIP) revision establishing a Federally enforceable state operating permit (FESOP) program. The approval also addressed hazardous air pollutants under Clean Air Act section 112, enabling Florida to issue federally enforceable operating permits.

key_quotes.quote: direct final rule approving a Florida State Implementation Plan (SIP) revision
Federally enforceable state operating permit (FESOP) program

dedupe.cluster_hint: EPA SIP direct final rule approvals (Feb 1996)

events.title: EPA approves California SIP revisions from multiple air districts for VOC controls
events.description: EPA published a direct final rule approving revisions to the California State Implementation Plan (SIP) submitted by several local air districts. The action incorporated VOC control rules into the federally approved SIP under the Clean Air Act.

key_quotes.quote: direct final rule approving revisions to the California SIP
incorporating VOC control rules into the federally approved SIP

dedupe.cluster_hint: EPA SIP direct final rule approvals (Feb 1996)

events.title: EPA approves Michigan SIP revision addressing transportation conformity requirements
events.description: EPA published a direct final rule approving a Michigan SIP revision addressing transportation conformity requirements for transportation plans, programs, and projects. The rule referenced requirements in 40 CFR part 51, subpart T.

key_quotes.quote: direct final rule approving a Michigan SIP revision
transportation conformity requirements

dedupe.cluster_hint: EPA SIP direct final rule approvals (Feb 1996)

events.title: EPA approves site-specific Michigan ozone SIP revision setting VOC RACT for Enamalum (Novi)
events.description: EPA published a direct final rule approving a site-specific Michigan SIP revision related to ozone. The action set a reasonably available control technology (RACT) level for VOC emissions for Enamalum Corporation in Novi, making a state consent order federally enforceable.

key_quotes.quote: approving a site-specific Michigan SIP revision (ozone)
RACT level for VOC emissions from Enamalum Corporation (Novi, Michigan)

dedupe.cluster_hint: EPA SIP direct final rule approvals (Feb 1996)

events.title: EPA approves Missouri transportation conformity SIP submissions for Kansas City and St. Louis areas
events.description: EPA published a direct final rule approving Missouri SIP submissions for transportation conformity. The action was intended to satisfy EPA transportation conformity rule criteria and procedures required under 40 CFR 51.396, including for the Kansas City and St. Louis areas.

key_quotes.quote: direct final rule approving Missouri SIP submissions for transportation conformity
meet the ... procedures required under 40 CFR 51.396

dedupe.cluster_hint: EPA SIP direct final rule approvals (Feb 1996)
